beats.caption: AC-1 - card: host, ONLINE, version, latency, last seen
beats.expectedScreen: the studio-mac card highlighted: green dot + ONLINE, host 100.101.14.32, Agent 0.5.2, a latency in ms, Last seen a few seconds ago

beats.caption: AC-2 - stale heartbeat flips card OFFLINE
beats.expectedScreen: the attic-mini card highlighted: red dot + OFFLINE, Last seen 8m ago (heartbeat past the 30s freshness window)

beats.caption: AC-3 - verbs + recent invocation log
beats.expectedScreen: the studio-mac card highlighted showing the verb chips (exec.run, fs.read, fs.write, ...) and the invocation-log table with rows and callers (orchestrator, dev-env, kanban-loop)

beats.caption: AC-4 - pairing mints token + one-line installer
beats.expectedScreen: the generated one-line installer command highlighted, a curl .../install.sh line carrying GARRISON_TOKEN= and GARRISON_MACHINE=

beats.caption: AC-5 - SSH provisioning form: host + user
beats.expectedScreen: the SSH provisioning tab with a tailnet-host input, an ssh-user input, and a Provision button (output streams live below); not provisioned
